revenue_segments.name: Product Revenue
revenue_segments.commentary: Driven by increased revenue from software licenses and increased demand for new generation of hardware products.

revenue_segments.name: Subscription and Support Revenue
revenue_segments.commentary: Growth due to increased costs to support the growth of subscription and support offerings.

forward_guidance.text: We expect our revenue to vary from quarter to quarter based on seasonal and cyclical factors.

key_risks.description: Our business is subject to the risks of earthquakes, fire, power outages, floods, health risks, and other catastrophic events.
Our operating results may be adversely affected by unfavorable economic and market conditions and the uncertain geopolitical environment.

bull_case: Strong revenue growth driven by increased demand for software licenses and new hardware products (MD&A chunk 90).
High gross margins maintained at 73.6% (MD&A chunk 88).
bear_case: Exposure to risks from natural disasters and geopolitical instability (Risk Factors chunk 212).
Potential adverse effects from economic and market conditions (Quantitative Disclosures chunk 113).
what_to_watch: Impact of seasonal and cyclical factors on revenue (MD&A chunk 89).
Continued growth in subscription and support revenue (MD&A chunk 94).
data_gaps: EPS estimate and revenue estimate for the upcoming quarter are not available.
